title: Rename device - old FW no rename, new FW rename present
scenario: Device Name setting visibility in Device Settings > General toggles based on firmware version on supported Poly devices (Voyager Free 60+, Voyager Free 60, Voyager Free 20, Sync 20, Sync 20M, Sync 40)
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on your Android device.
2. Navigate to the Home screen and ensure your Poly device (e.g., Poly Voyager Free 60+) is connected.
3. Tap on the connected device name to open Device Settings.
4. In Device Settings, locate and tap on 'General'.
5. Verify that the 'Device Name' setting is NOT displayed in the General menu.
6. Update the Poly device firmware to the latest version using the Poly Studio Mobile app (Home → Device Settings → Firmware Update).
7. After the firmware update completes and the device reconnects, navigate back to Device Settings → General.
8. Verify that the 'Device Name' setting IS now displayed in the General menu.
9. Tap on 'Device Name' and confirm you can edit and save a custom name for the device.
expected: The 'Device Name' setting should not appear in Device Settings > General when the device is on old firmware. After updating to new firmware, the 'Device Name' setting should appear and allow renaming of supported devices (Poly Voyager Free 60+, Poly Voyager Free 60, Poly Voyager Free 20, Poly Sync 20, Poly Sync 20M, Poly Sync 40).
